# Supply Cost Tracker workspace notes

- Single-page React + TypeScript app built with Vite, Tailwind CSS, and Recharts.
- Keep the dashboard as the default landing view.
- Keep all business data in React state; there is no backend.
- Seed data lives in src/seedData.ts and should stay realistic for cleaning businesses.
- Preserve the B2B SaaS look: white cards, subtle shadows, and blue accents.
